---
title: "`r params$country_name`"
subtitle: "Populism × Liberalism — temporal evolution of all scored parties"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
params:
  country_name: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(arrow); library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(purrr); library(jsonlite)
})
SITE <- if (file.exists("../_quarto.yml")) ".." else "."

meta <- read_parquet(file.path(SITE, "data/manifestos_meta.parquet")) |>
  filter(countryname == params$country_name)
agg <- read_parquet(file.path(SITE, "data/agg_long.parquet")) |>
  filter(doc_id %in% meta$doc_id) |>
  left_join(meta |> select(doc_id, year, partyabbrev, partyname, party), by = "doc_id")

# Cross-model mean per (manifesto × dim)
manifesto_scores <- agg |>
  group_by(doc_id, dim, year, party, partyabbrev, partyname) |>
  summarise(score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Wide per manifesto — keep all dims that the JS dropdown may select
KEEP_DIMS <- c("populism_overall","pop_ideology_overall",
               "liberalism_overall","lib_political","lib_social",
               "lib_economic","lib_financial_market")
wide <- manifesto_scores |>
  filter(dim %in% KEEP_DIMS) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = dim, values_from = score) |>
  arrange(party, year)

# Top N parties by number of manifestos (chronological coverage)
top_parties <- wide |>
  count(party, partyabbrev, partyname, sort = TRUE) |>
  filter(n >= 2)  # need ≥2 manifestos for a "trend"

cat("Country:", params$country_name, "  Manifestos:", nrow(wide),
    "  Parties with ≥2 manifestos:", nrow(top_parties), "\n")
```

::: {.manifesto-meta}
[**Country**]{.item} `r params$country_name` ·
[**Scored manifestos**]{.item} `r nrow(wide)` ·
[**Parties (≥ 2 manifestos)**]{.item} `r nrow(top_parties)` ·
[**Time span**]{.item} `r min(wide$year, na.rm=TRUE)` – `r max(wide$year, na.rm=TRUE)`
:::

## How parties have moved — time series

Each line is one party.  Click a legend item to isolate it.

<div id="ts-plot"></div>

## Populism × Liberalism trajectories

Each dot is one party-year manifesto.  Arrows trace each party's chronological
path through the populism × liberalism space.

<div id="scatter-plot"></div>

```{r emit, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Restrict scatter / TS data to parties with ≥2 manifestos so the lines make sense
plot_data <- wide |>
  filter(party %in% top_parties$party) |>
  mutate(label = ifelse(is.na(partyabbrev) | partyabbrev == "",
                        substr(partyname, 1, 14), partyabbrev)) |>
  arrange(party, year)
json <- jsonlite::toJSON(plot_data, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
cat(sprintf('
<script src="../assets/country-plots.js"></script>
<script>
  window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    renderCountryPlots("ts-plot", "scatter-plot", %s, %s);
  });
</script>
', json, jsonlite::toJSON(params$country_name, auto_unbox = TRUE)))
```

## Parties — sortable table

```{r table, echo=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(reactable))
party_summary <- wide |>
  group_by(party, partyabbrev, partyname) |>
  summarise(
    n_manifestos = n(),
    first_year = min(year), last_year = max(year),
    pop_mean = round(mean(populism_overall, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    lib_mean = round(mean(liberalism_overall, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    pop_trend = {
      vals <- populism_overall[!is.na(populism_overall)]
      if (length(vals) >= 2) round(tail(vals, 1) - head(vals, 1), 2) else NA_real_
    },
    .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(party_link = sprintf('<a href="../party/%s.html">%s</a>',
                              party, ifelse(is.na(partyabbrev) | partyabbrev == "",
                                            substr(partyname, 1, 14), partyabbrev))) |>
  arrange(desc(n_manifestos))

reactable(
  party_summary |> select(party_link, partyname, n_manifestos,
                          first_year, last_year, pop_mean, lib_mean, pop_trend),
  columns = list(
    party_link   = colDef(name = "Party",  html = TRUE, minWidth = 90),
    partyname    = colDef(name = "Full name", minWidth = 220),
    n_manifestos = colDef(name = "Manifestos", align = "center", maxWidth = 100),
    first_year   = colDef(name = "First",  align = "center", maxWidth = 80),
    last_year    = colDef(name = "Last",   align = "center", maxWidth = 80),
    pop_mean     = colDef(name = "Pop ⌀",  align = "center", maxWidth = 80),
    lib_mean     = colDef(name = "Lib ⌀",  align = "center", maxWidth = 80),
    pop_trend    = colDef(name = "ΔPop",   align = "center", maxWidth = 80)
  ),
  defaultSorted = list(n_manifestos = "desc"),
  filterable = TRUE, striped = TRUE, bordered = TRUE, compact = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 25
)
```
